meta_description: Learn how to SaaS starter kit and overcome can't deploy apps. A Advanced-level Case Study using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: SaaS Starter Kit: Deploy Apps Fast (Freelancer Case Study)
content.seo_description: Stop struggling with deployment bottlenecks. Learn how to use a SaaS starter kit with Antigravity and Claude Code to ship professional apps in record time.
content.answer_block: Stop fighting infrastructure and start shipping. By utilizing a pre-configured SaaS starter kit, you abstract away deployment complexity, CI/CD pipelines, and database migrations. Pairing this with Antigravity and Claude Code allows you to automate boilerplate, ensuring you can deploy robust, production-ready applications for clients in hours, not weeks.
content.intro:
You’re staring at a blank terminal at 2 AM, the client demo is in twelve hours, and your deployment pipeline is throwing cryptic exit codes that make zero sense. You didn't become a developer to manage AWS permissions or debug environment variables; you became one to build. The 'can't deploy' bottleneck is the silent killer of freelance careers, turning high-value architects into frustrated sysadmins.

But there is a better way. By adopting a hardened SaaS starter kit, you reclaim your technical sovereignty. Instead of reinventing the authentication, billing, and database wheel for every project, you leverage a battle-tested foundation. This case study reveals how to automate your entire deployment lifecycle using Antigravity and Claude Code, transforming you from a struggling coder into a high-velocity product engineer.

steps.title: Bootstrap the Architecture
steps.description: Initialize your project using a high-performance SaaS starter kit to ensure all core services are pre-wired for production deployment.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Bootstrap a new SaaS starter project with Next.js, Supabase, and Stripe integration. Ensure the directory structure is optimized for Vercel deployment.

steps.title: Automate Database Migrations
steps.description: Remove manual database configuration by syncing your schema directly from the starter kit definitions.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate migration scripts for the user authentication and subscription schema. Ensure compatibility with the current production environment.

steps.title: Configure CI/CD Pipelines
steps.description: Define your deployment strategy so every 'git push' triggers a verified build process.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a GitHub Actions workflow that runs linting, testing, and deployment to Vercel on main branch merges.

steps.title: Inject Environment Secrets
steps.description: Securely manage your API keys and production secrets using CLI-based injection to avoid environment drift.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a script to validate and sync environment variables between local development and production environments.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run "npx dotenv-cli -- npm run deploy:secrets"

steps.title: Verify Production Health
steps.description: Run an automated smoke test suite to ensure the live environment is stable before handing it off to the client.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a Playwright test suite that verifies critical paths: user signup, login, and checkout flow.

pro_tips: Always use a 'staging' environment variable prefix to prevent accidental production database wipes.
Automate your 'git commit' messages using Claude Code to maintain a clean, professional changelog for your clients.
Use ephemeral preview environments for every pull request to give clients a live link to review features before merge.
Keep your starter kit dependencies updated monthly; technical debt in a starter kit compounds faster than in custom code.
Implement a 'rollback' command in your CLI tool to instantly revert to the last stable deployment if a build fails.
content.next_steps: After completing this deployment workflow, document your custom configuration as a personal template. This will allow you to reduce future project setup time by an additional 30%.
content.conversion_block: You now have the exact blueprint to eliminate deployment friction for every client project you touch. Stop struggling with infrastructure and start building the features that actually generate revenue. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
